creator: insane@lunatic.oneinsane.net
text:
This is the complete mail server system, There is also another PR for the
same system http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=21719. and that one
is currently still open. This looks like it would make a great all in one
system for someone who wants to do it on a small scale using only one
machine.
